subject: refactor(modules): migrate module domain to DaisyUI card/badge/alert/tabs
body:
Largest chunk of the migration — 18 files. Every status/decision surface
gets its DaisyUI equivalent so the entire module workflow tints coherently
with the active theme.

- ModuleCard: expired / pending-proposal / default surfaces are bg-base-*
  combinations. Status pills become badge-error/success/info/warning. Move
  up/down become `btn btn-ghost btn-sm btn-square`. Delete button keeps
  ghost styling with `text-error` override.
- ModuleViewer / ModuleEditor: back button → `btn btn-ghost`. Content
  textarea → `textarea textarea-bordered`. Sticky save bar uses bg-base-100
  border-base-300. Success/failure feedback → text-success / text-error.
- ModuleSummaryCard: left-border accent is `border-l-primary` so the
  theme-accent tint carries across. Body surface is bg-base-200.
- ModuleSummaryEditor: wrapper is bg-base-200 + base-300. Fields use
  `input input-bordered input-sm` via new SummaryField form-control shell.
- ProposalCard: `card card-compact` with variant-mapped badges; counter-
  proposal block uses `bg-info/10`; reject button is ghost + text-error.
- NotesList: each row is a `card card-compact`, source chip is `badge
  badge-ghost badge-sm`. Delete button `text-error hover:bg-error/10`.
- AddNoteForm / ProposeChangeForm: `textarea textarea-bordered`, `select
  select-bordered`, `label-text` wrappers. Error text → text-error.
- ContractUploadPreview: batch progress dots use bg-base-300/info/success/
  error; parser/duplicate warnings become `alert alert-warning/error`;
  file drop zone uses base-300 dashed border with base-200 hover; rename
  inline input → `input input-bordered input-sm`; split/merge actions →
  DaisyUI `link`.
- TemplateSelector: tab bar is `tabs tabs-bordered tab/tab-active`.
  Template cards use base-300 borders; upload tab warnings are alert-*.
- VersionHistoryPanel: current version is base-100 card, prior versions
  are base-200 card (softer past surface). Signature chips are `badge
  badge-success badge-sm`.
- SigningStatus: locked = `alert alert-success`, ready = `alert alert-
  warning`. Icons inherit currentColor from the alert.
- ReadyToSignToggle / BatchSignActions / SignatureLog / NudgeExpiryConfig:
  inputs → DaisyUI form controls; surfaces → card bg-base-200.
- ToneSelector: input + add button → input-bordered + btn; label /
  muted text → label-text + base-content/50. Hash-based tone colors stay
  hardcoded (data palette, brand exception documented in the hex map).

Outside print: overrides in PdfPreview, `src/` has zero hardcoded slate /
gray / colored-palette utilities.

Tags: refactor, ui, daisyui, modules
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-migration
Semver: patch
